scene_summary: A water-scarred contact sheet plate: three upper crop cells, one large central carry-and-reach aperture, and four lower crop cells, all held by dirty paper gutters, pinholes, red edge tags, black fabric tears, aqua water planes, and small glints.
usable_surfaces: lower-left dark torso crop with red pinhole
lower-center black fabric tear with red underlayer
lower-right pale clipped body tile with pinhole

detected_objects.label: hero diagonal carry aperture
detected_objects.visual_evidence: The dominant central source window is the large rectangular photo aperture filled with three wet figures in a diagonal carry-and-reach pose across an aqua water field.

detected_objects.label: hero submerged waterline cut
detected_objects.visual_evidence: The aqua lower band cuts through the central aperture, bending beneath the bodies as a broad submerged waterline seam.

detected_objects.label: character-sheet crop cell
detected_objects.visual_evidence: The upper-middle crop cell shows submerged body-study material with paper pressure, caustic light, and a round punched hole.

detected_objects.label: retro-internet thumbnail cluster
detected_objects.visual_evidence: The upper-left crop cell stacks aqua water, dark cloth, a pale triangular body plane, a red hanging thread, and a tiny white pinhole glint in a thumbnail-like corner cluster.

detected_objects.label: aurient leaning block
detected_objects.visual_evidence: A low dark horizontal compressed shadow block runs under the central bodies, with shapes leaning across a narrow bright water gap.

detected_objects.label: feather inbox pale tile
detected_objects.visual_evidence: The lower-right top cell contains a pale clipped triangular body-and-paper tile with soft edge glow around a black field and a bright round pinhole.

detected_objects.label: black fabric tear red underlayer
detected_objects.visual_evidence: In the lower-center cell, a jagged black fabric tear exposes a red triangular underlayer and white cracked edges, a clear source-bearing scar.

detected_objects.label: typelit ink ribbon
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Planned source surface fallback used because plate inspection returned fewer mapped objects than source bindings.

detected_objects.label: feather inbox pale tile
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Planned source surface fallback used because plate inspection returned fewer mapped objects than source bindings.

complexity_assessment.rationale: The plate is expressionist and contact-sheet minimal in structure, but the many crop cells, wet-body highlights, pinholes, red ticks, and torn scars create moderate visual density. It remains usable because the central gesture dominates and the source windows sit on real visible edges.

mapping_note: Package assembly filled unmapped source pockets from planned artifact surfaces because plate inspection returned too few detected objects.
